news_items.headline: Colorado Rockies vs. Cincinnati Reds game discussion: Brady Singer vs. Gabriel Hughes
news_items.summary: The Rockies have not aced their season and have left much to be desired, but the climb resumes tonight—and there are still plenty of reasons to keep watching.

news_items.headline: Padres vs Royals, July 17 game discussion
news_items.summary: Two starts ago, Seth Lugo faced off against his original big league team in a wild game that the Royals ultimately won despite him pitching quite poorly. He will look to do better today against his other former club, the one that first gave him a shot to resume starting after what had seemed a […]

news_items.headline: Dodgers on Deck: Saturday, July 18 at Yankees
news_items.summary: The Dodgers and Yankees continue their weekend series in The Bronx on Saturday night. Emmet Sheehan takes the ball for Los Angeles, while left-hander Ryan Weathers starts for the Yankees. The Dodgers are 18-10 in games started by opposing southpaws this season. The middle game of the series will have Joe Davis on the call, […]

news_items.headline: Dodgers expect Shohei Ohtani to pitch next week as they manage his knee ailment
news_items.summary: Shohei Ohtani had lubricant injected into his left knee, and the Dodgers two-way star is expected to start Wednesday against the Philadelphia Phillies.
